title: Yangor Electric Fly Zapper Indoor, Mosquito Killer Lamp with Dual LED UV Tubes, Square Bug Zapper with 1cm Safe Grid, Removable Tray, 1.1m Cord, Hanging Chain for Home Kitchen Bedroom
bullet_points: Classic Square Design with Durable Build: Yangor electric fly zapper features a timeless square shape that fits perfectly into any indoor setting. Built with a sturdy aluminium alloy frame combined with a durable plastic housing, it offers both strength and long-lasting performance.

Dual LED UV Tubes for Strong Attraction: Equipped with 2 energy-efficient LED UV tubes, this mosquito killer lamp effectively attracts flies, mosquitoes, and other flying insects. The wide coverage makes it ideal for bedrooms, kitchens, offices, and indoor living spaces.

Safe Anti-Touch 1cm Protective Grid: Designed with a 1cm narrow safety spacing, the outer grid prevents accidental contact with the internal electric mesh. This added protection ensures safer use in households with children and pets.

Easy-Clean Removable Collection Tray: The detachable bottom tray collects insect debris for quick and hygienic cleaning. Simply slide out the tray, empty it, and rinse when needed—no complicated maintenance required.

Flexible Hanging & Practical Power Cord: Comes with a strong metal hanging chain for convenient placement in different indoor areas. The 1.1m power cord provides flexibility to connect to standard UK sockets, suitable for home, garage, or workspace use.
